message:
feat: add WASM browser demo and Table API

- Add self-contained WASM module with working exports for browser use
- Fix memory alignment in bump allocator for BigInt64Array compatibility
- Fix packed protobuf parsing for column metadata
- Add Table API for high-level column access (table.zig, lance_file.zig)
- Add schema parsing for field metadata (schema.zig)
- Add browser demo with drag-and-drop file loading (examples/wasm/)
- Expand integration tests for Table API and schema access
